prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
Absolutely! Here’s your quick pep talk to get you moving:

**"You’ve got this! That task might feel heavy, but you’ve tackled harder things before. Every small step forward is progress. The longer you wait, the bigger it grows in your mind—so take control now. You don’t need to be perfect, just start. Five minutes of action will build momentum. You’re capable, you’re strong, and you’ve got what it takes. Let’s go—one step at a time!"**

Now, take a deep breath, set a timer for just 5 minutes, and dive in. You’ve got this! 💪🔥
